Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect\('backend/diplom.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT id, vectorization_data FROM reconstructions WHERE vectorization_data IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1'\)
row = cur.fetchone\(\)
if row:
    print\('ID:', row[0]\)
    data = json.loads\(row[1]\)
    print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:3000]\)
else:
    print\('No rows with vectorization_data'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect\('C:/DIPLOM/diplom_aog/backend/diplom3d.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT id, vectorization_data FROM reconstructions WHERE vectorization_data IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1'\)
row = cur.fetchone\(\)
if row:
    data = json.loads\(row[1]\)
    with open\('C:/DIPLOM/diplom_aog/json/reconstruction_12.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        json.dump\(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)
    print\('saved, keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
    for k, v in data.items\(\):
        if isinstance\(v, list\):
            print\(f'  {k}: {len\(v\)} items'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect\('C:/DIPLOM/diplom_aog/backend/diplom3d.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT id, vectorization_data FROM reconstructions WHERE vectorization_data IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1'\)
row = cur.fetchone\(\)
data = json.loads\(row[1]\)
with open\('C:/DIPLOM/diplom_aog/json/reconstruction_12.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)
for k, v in data.items\(\):
    print\(f'{k}: {len\(v\) if isinstance\(v, list\) else v} items'\)
conn.close\(\)
")
